title: FundingProgram
description: A government, NGO, or hospital-based financial assistance scheme for medical treatment. Contains eligibility criteria, required documents, application process details, and contact information. Used by navigators to match patients to available funding.

schemeName.description: Official name of the funding program or scheme.

description.description: Detailed description of the program, what it covers, and its purpose.

eligibilityCriteria.description: Text description of who qualifies for this program.
examples: Annual family income below ₹72,000. Tamil Nadu resident. Below poverty line card holder.

documentsRequired.description: List of documents needed to apply.
examples: Income certificate, Aadhaar card, hospital estimate, ration card

contactPerson.description: Name of the contact person for this program.

maxAmount.description: Maximum financial assistance available in INR.

isActive.description: Whether this program is currently active and accepting applications.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of last modification.

examples.description: Tamil Nadu government scheme providing free treatment for low-income families at empaneled hospitals.
examples.eligibilityCriteria: Annual family income below ₹72,000. Tamil Nadu resident. Below poverty line card holder.
examples.documentsRequired: Income certificate, Aadhaar card, hospital estimate, ration card
examples.applicationProcess: Apply through the hospital's billing department with required documents. Processing time: 3–5 business days.
